section_name: Military Specialty License Plates for Recipients of Certain Military Campaign and Service Awards

subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates for recipients of the following military awards that include the name of the award:
the Global War on Terrorism Expeditionary Medal;
the Global War on Terrorism Service Medal;
the Nuclear Deterrence Operations Service Medal.
Reenacted and amended by Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 915 (H.B. 3607 ), Sec. 20.005, eff. September 1, 2021.

history.raw: Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 746 (H.B.819), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2019.
